backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor managing file uploads, metadata, tokens, finalized content, user profiles, and access-controlled queries and mutations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a specific frontend public-link generation requirement to affected files, components, and tests.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Reference list of prewritten summaries for all frontend source files used for build or documentation purposes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based style layer defining OKLCH color tokens for light/dark themes and base element styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point providing the root mount node and loading the Vite/React main.tsx script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes, shared layout, theming, and global components such as the profile dialog and toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthStatusB: Badge showing guest, loading, or authenticated user profile name based on Internet Identity and profile query state.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button handling Internet Identity authentication with loading states and query cache reset on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Dialog prompting authenticated users without a saved profile to enter their name, with save and loading handling.
frontend/src/components/files/FileUpload: UI panel for selecting a file and performing chunked uploads with progress display, error messages, and success reset.
frontend/src/components/files/MyFilesTab: Displays the user's uploaded files with loading, error, and empty states, and allows copying public download links.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Provides the main app layout with header, navigation, footer, and authentication-aware links.
frontend/src/features/admin/useIsAdmin.t: React Query hook that checks whether the current user is an admin via the backend actor.
Fetches all files from the backend for admin or global views using React Query.
frontend/src/features/files/useDownloadF: Mutation hook to download a file and trigger a client download while updating global stats.
frontend/src/features/files/useMyFiles.t: Loads files owned by the current user using the backend actor.
frontend/src/features/react-query/errorM: Normalizes backend and network errors into user-friendly messages.
frontend/src/features/react-query/queryK: Defines shared React Query keys for caching and invalidation.
frontend/src/features/stats/useGlobalSta: Fetches aggregated platform stats like file count, size, and downloads.
frontend/src/features/uploads/useChunked: Handles chunked file uploads with progress tracking, finalization, and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance based on user identity and refreshes dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, login handling, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Hooks for fetching and saving the caller's user profile using React Query.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup with theme variables, dark mode rules, and global styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard that checks admin status, lists all files with metadata, and provides copyable public download links.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: User dashboard that requires login, shows upload panel, and displays the user's files.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page showing platform description and global statistics such as total files, storage, and downloads.
frontend/src/pages/PublicDownloadPage.ts: Public file download page that auto-initiates downloads using a token and handles loading, success, and error states.
frontend/src/utils/download.ts: Utility for triggering a browser download from raw byte data by creating a Blob and clickable link.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Helpers for formatting byte sizes and timestamps into human-readable strings.
frontend/src/utils/links.ts: Builds public download URLs and provides a clipboard copy helper.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using both query strings and sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and enabling typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Defines the project state and requirements for replacing predictable numeric download URLs with permanent short random IDs. Lists existing features, new feature requests, and notes on deprecating legacy URL routes.
